description: Sequential run isolation — same fixture run twice, each run scoped by run.id timestamp
purpose: Proves the reconcile job's WHERE bj.started_at >= ? filter correctly isolates each run's reconciliation. If this filter is removed or broken, run 2 would aggregate both runs' batches and produce a staged_count of 6 instead of 3.
whatWouldBreakThis: Removing or broadening the started_at >= ? filter in ReconcileJobConfig would cause run 2 to include run 1's batches, inflating staged_count and posted_count to 6 in a single reconciliation row.
